name: plugin-health-auditor
description: Evidence-backed health checks for Codex plugins, agent skills, hooks, scripts, and MCP configuration.

interface.shortDescription: Audit agent plugins before they audit your budget.
interface.longDescription: Scan Codex plugins and agent skills for always-on triggers, context overhead, invocation amplification, risky scripts, hooks, MCP permissions, secrets, and configuration problems. Every deterministic finding includes file and line evidence; the bundled skill can guide a separately labeled semantic review by an explicitly configured host Codex task.
defaultPrompt: Audit this plugin and explain its highest-priority evidence-backed risks.
